create table artifacts ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, artifact_name varchar(255) not null, run_ids json not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table artifacts ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, artifact_name varchar(255) not null, run_ids json not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-03-27 22:22:05.385 [main] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - create table flow_executions ( is_replay boolean, iteration integer, replay_count integer, revolutions integer, created_at timestamp(6) not null, end_time timestamp(6), flow_group_id bigint, flow_id bigint not null, start_time timestamp(6), id uuid not null, original_flow_execution_id uuid, category varchar(255), status varchar(255) check (status in ('PENDING','RUNNING','PASSED','FAILED','CANCELLED','SCHEDULED','IN_PROGRESS')), runtime_variables json, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table flow_executions ( is_replay boolean, iteration integer, replay_count integer, revolutions integer, created_at timestamp(6) not null, end_time timestamp(6), flow_group_id bigint, flow_id bigint not null, start_time timestamp(6), id uuid not null, original_flow_execution_id uuid, category varchar(255), status varchar(255) check (status in ('PENDING','RUNNING','PASSED','FAILED','CANCELLED','SCHEDULED','IN_PROGRESS')), runtime_variables json, primary key (id) ) 2026-03-27 22:22:05.386 [main] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - create table flow_groups ( current_iteration integer not null, revolutions integer not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, flow_group_name varchar(255) not null, flows json not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table flow_groups ( current_iteration integer not null, revolutions integer not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, flow_group_name varchar(255) not null, flows json not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-03-27 22:22:05.386 [main] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - create table flow_steps ( application_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, branch varchar(255) not null, description varchar(255), scheduler_type varchar(255), test_stage varchar(255) not null, test_tag varchar(255) not null, timer_days varchar(255), timer_hours varchar(255), timer_minutes varchar(255), squash_step_ids json, test_data_ids json, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table flow_steps ( application_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, branch varchar(255) not null, description varchar(255), scheduler_type varchar(255), test_stage varchar(255) not null, test_tag varchar(255) not null, timer_days varchar(255), timer_hours varchar(255), timer_minutes varchar(255), squash_step_ids json, test_data_ids json, primary key (id) ) 2026-03-27 22:22:05.387 [main] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - create table flows ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint not null, squash_test_case_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, automation_status varchar(20) check (automation_status in ('AUTOMATED','PARTIAL','NOT_AUTOMATED')), squash_test_case varchar(255) not null, flow_step_ids json not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table flows ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint not null, squash_test_case_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, automation_status varchar(20) check (automation_status in ('AUTOMATED','PARTIAL','NOT_AUTOMATED')), squash_test_case varchar(255) not null, flow_step_ids json not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-03-27 22:22:05.388 [main] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - create table pipeline_executions ( is_replay boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, end_time timestamp(6), flow_id bigint not null, flow_step_id bigint not null, id bigint not null, job_id bigint, pipeline_id bigint, resume_time timestamp(6), start_time timestamp(6), flow_execution_id uuid not null, job_url varchar(255), pipeline_url varchar(255), status varchar(255) check (status in ('PENDING','RUNNING','PASSED','FAILED','CANCELLED','SCHEDULED','IN_PROGRESS')), configured_test_data json, runtime_test_data json, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table pipeline_executions ( is_replay boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, end_time timestamp(6), flow_id bigint not null, flow_step_id bigint not null, id bigint not null, job_id bigint, pipeline_id bigint, resume_time timestamp(6), start_time timestamp(6), flow_execution_id uuid not null, job_url varchar(255), pipeline_url varchar(255), status varchar(255) check (status in ('PENDING','RUNNING','PASSED','FAILED','CANCELLED','SCHEDULED','IN_PROGRESS')), configured_test_data json, runtime_test_data json, primary key (id) ) 2026-03-27 22:22:05.389 [main] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - create table queued_flow_executions ( iteration integer, priority integer, retry_count integer, revolutions integer, created_at timestamp(6) not null, flow_group_id bigint, flow_id bigint not null, id bigint not null, flow_execution_id uuid not null, category varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table queued_flow_executions ( iteration integer, priority integer, retry_count integer, revolutions integer, created_at timestamp(6) not null, flow_group_id bigint, flow_id bigint not null, id bigint not null, flow_execution_id uuid not null, category varchar(255), primary key (id) ) 2026-03-27 22:22:05.390 [main] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - create table test_data ( application_id bigint, created_at timestamp(6) not null, data_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, application_name varchar(255), category varchar(255) not null, description varchar(255), variables json not null, primary key (data_id) ) Hibernate: create table test_data ( application_id bigint, created_at timestamp(6) not null, data_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, application_name varchar(255), category varchar(255) not null, description varchar(255), variables json not null, primary key (data_id) ) 2026-03-27 22:22:05.391 [main] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL -
